title: [Snowy Plains, The River]
description: Beside the trail, the river has become a torrent of rushing water.  Huge chunks of ice gnash forcefully together, spraying you with frigid droplets.  A formation of rocks points the way south toward a barely seen small path.

wayto.2534: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'southeast'
wayto.2536: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'west'
